name: Gandia — Running circular by the beach and the Río Serpis
name_original: Gandia — Running circular por la playa y el Río Serpis
region_intro: Jogging around Gandia offers a diverse range of terrains, from flat coastal promenades to challenging mountain trails. The region features extensive sandy beaches and serene marshlands like Marjal de Gandia, providing unique landscapes for running. Elevated areas such as the Mondúver region also offer more demanding routes. These varied landscapes provide opportunities for different types of running experiences. Best jogging routes around Gandia The most popular jogging route is Gandia — Running circular by the beach and the Río Serpis, a 7.9 miles (12.7 km) trail that takes 1 hour 19 minutes to complete. This moderate route offers views of both the coastline and the Serpis River. Another top favourite among local runners is Gandia Beach – Gandia Beach loop from Antiga Estació del Grau, a moderate 5.4 miles (8.7 km) path. This route provides a scenic loop along Gandia Beach, ideal for a steady run. Local runners also love the Gandia Beach – Gandia Beach loop from Antiga Estació del Grau, a 14.0 miles (22.5 km) trail leading through Gandia Beach, often completed in about 2 hours 24 minutes. Jogging around Gandia is defined by its coastal promenades, marshlands, and mountain trails, offering options for different ability levels. The routes in Gandia are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.0 stars from over 40 reviews. More than 5000 runners have used komoot to explore Gandia's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many running routes are available in Gandia?
A: Gandia offers a wide selection of over 100 running routes. These include a diverse range of options, with 12 easy routes, 67 moderate routes, and 31 challenging trails, catering to all fitness levels.

Q: What types of terrain can I expect on jogging routes in Gandia?
A: Gandia's diverse landscape provides a variety of terrains for jogging. You can enjoy flat, scenic runs along the extensive sandy beaches and promenades, explore serene environments in natural areas like the Marjal de Gandia marshlands, or tackle more challenging mountain trails in regions such as Mondúver and near Bairén Castle. There are also greenways like the Greenway of Safor for smooth, flat runs.

Q: Are there any easy or beginner-friendly jogging routes in Gandia?
A: Yes, Gandia has 12 routes specifically categorized as easy, perfect for beginners or those looking for a relaxed run. Many of the coastal promenades and greenways offer flat and accessible paths. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38250636" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Breakwater – Gandia Beach loop from Platja de Gandia&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate option that is relatively flat and scenic.

Q: Where can I find a long-distance running trail in Gandia?
A: For a longer run, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/33813498" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gandia Beach loop from Antiga Estació del Grau&lt;/a&gt;. This challenging route covers approximately 13.8 miles (22.3 km) and offers an extended experience along the coast.

Q: Are there any circular running routes in Gandia?
A: Yes, many routes in Gandia are circular, offering convenient starting and ending points. A popular option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e832444787/gandia-running-circular-by-the-beach-and-the-rio-serpis" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gandia — Running circular by the beach and the Río Serpis&lt;/a&gt;, which is 7.9 miles (12.7 km) and provides views of both the coastline and the Serpis River.

Q: What are some scenic jogging routes with good viewpoints in Gandia?
A: For scenic runs, the coastal promenades offer privileged sea views. If you're looking for elevated viewpoints, consider routes that venture into the mountains. The Molló de la Creu, though a challenging hike, offers stunning panoramic views of Gandia and the Safor region. You can also find beautiful vistas from highlights like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/635104" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Visteta Viewpoint&lt;/a&gt; or &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3981973" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Coll de la Radella Viewpoint&lt;/a&gt;, which can be incorporated into more challenging runs.

Q: What do other runners think about the jogging routes in Gandia?
A: The running routes in Gandia are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 3.9 stars from over 30 reviews. Runners often praise the diverse landscapes, from the beautiful beaches to the serene marshlands and challenging mountain trails, providing varied experiences for all abilities.

Q: Are there any natural attractions or landmarks to see along the running trails?
A: Absolutely. Gandia's routes often pass by or near significant natural and historical sites. You can explore the coastal ecosystem of the Marjal de Gandia marshlands, or run near historic sites like Bairén Castle. Other natural highlights in the region include &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5152261" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;The Salty Spring&lt;/a&gt;, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4866511" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Natural area of the "Font Salà"&lt;/a&gt;, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5968459" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Duke's Pond Spring&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Can I find routes that combine beach and river scenery?
A: Yes, you can. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e832444787/gandia-running-circular-by-the-beach-and-the-rio-serpis" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gandia — Running circular by the beach and the Río Serpis&lt;/a&gt; route is an excellent example, offering a dynamic experience that takes you along both the coastline and the banks of the Serpis River.

Q: Are there any challenging running trails for experienced runners in Gandia?
A: For experienced runners seeking a challenge, Gandia offers 31 difficult routes. The Mondúver area is known for its legendary routes with steep ascents and breathtaking views, requiring good physical fitness. The KM Vertical Gandia race also takes place in the nearby mountains, indicating the presence of rugged and demanding terrain.

Q: What is a popular running loop along Gandia Beach?
A: A popular choice for a scenic run along the beach is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10357212" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gandia Beach – Gandia Beach loop from Antiga Estació del Grau&lt;/a&gt;. This moderate 5.4-mile (8.7 km) path provides a beautiful loop ideal for a steady run with coastal views.
tips: Very wide beach, excellent sand, clean water and great temperature.
